reviews.review_description: Hello anyone who is thinking about buying little nightmares vr altered echoes do it it has 4k resolution/graphics and my mono lovers he makes a small appearance at the beginning by the way you play as dark six it shows what happens after thin man takes six’s soul and bosses 10/10 ok everyone if you buy it enjoy but anyways piece out!!!

reviews.review_title: I woke up early to play this
reviews.review_description:
I'm a little disappointed. It doesn't feel like it was made for vr when it was. The controls are so clunky. Trying to climb things, I feel like a spider trying to climb a bath tub. 

Walking up to things it goes darker, then pretty much black. Walk away and you can see it again. 

Walk up to the portals and you get your eyes burnt out because you put the brightness up to see the bits that go dark.

I've gotten to the class room where you walk over the teacher. I've stopped and am waiting for hopefully some patches. I love little nightmares. 

I've used quest optimizer and pushed the scale to 180% looks a lot better. I thought visually it might look like that as standard. 

You have the likes of Red Matter and then this, looks like a quest 1 game 🫣

You can't take the hood off. Would have liked it to look 3D at least and change with lighting on it. I think it would be better having full arms and looking down and having a ghostly raincoat on. 

Just having hands and disappearing when you grab something is soooo rubbish 😩

Only snap turning, not that I use smooth turning but it's not an option if you do.

After writing this I feel very disappointed now. Not sure how 5 star reviews were put straight on after the game was launched. Suspect paid reviews.

So to start the game off, why is there no option for smooth turn? Yeah you can turn the snap turn trash off, but then physically have to turn, which I’m ok with for a little, but tend to like to always face a point in my room, so I don’t move around too much, and hit something, or step on a animal.  The force vignette that makes me feel like I’m coming out of a birth canal, is also a massive issue. Should be able to turn it right off. 
   Second I would love to address that $40 value, currently I would say this game isn’t worth it. It’s full of glitches, and issues that will leave you stuck in place, after a death, that usually only happens, because of their improper testing clearly. I got so bored of this game, after it kept sticking me to the floor. I had to restart checkpoints, restart the game, creating a headache, I literally feel like I gotta fight system problems to progress. On top of that the game is sadly just walk through a portal, solve to problems in that room, and progress through the next portal. I’ve been a massive fan of the series, and waited a long time to play this. Sadly price is way high to the issues that it came out with, feel you are paying for Bandi name brand over all.

I was jus gonna give it a 4 star...at first I kept wanting to use my controller to turn my body in the game like every VR game made...but I kinda love/hate it at the same time...
Awesome game I played 1 and 2 and this definitely stepped up the game adding it to VR...I hope more for more of the little nightmares in VR Thank You!

I've been waiting many years for a VR game for a little nightmares because I absolutely love the games and I found out you could draw with a crayon in the game which is also fun, I ran into two glitches but you could always fix them the first one I got seen by a light and I froze and I couldn't move so I had to reset and the second one I was climbing a ladder too fast and I started getting launched off things so I had to leave and come back. But this game was so gooood. You have a triangle around your head like you have a hood on and you can't turn it off but I love it lol it makes me immersed

Said spoilers will be later however, I first want to address the other reviews. Stop complaining about the hood and snap turn. You don’t actually notice the hood, and the snap turn isn’t the type where it fades for a second, it’s just a snap, if you don’t want it then turn your body. Some other non spoiler things, the game looks beautiful throughout the whole game, puzzles never felt too shallow or convoluted, and the runtime of 3-5 hours was enjoyable.

Anyways leave now if you don’t want spoilers, the story is a bit disappointing at first. I’m sure I just don’t understand it yet, but I was expecting the bridge between the first 2 and 3, to explain what happened, but it doesn’t do that, which is fine. I’m kinda glad it just separated 3 from the main franchise. Also animations, could use a few in between animations, as a good few just snap between each other. Something I haven’t seen anyone mention is that you can’t jump, but to compensate there’s a big focus on climbing, like at the end of Chapter 2 where you climb a tall structure of books and desks to escape the teacher.

It’s a great game, and so far I’d even consider it a Little Nightmares game unlike 3, however it’s just missing that slight bit of polish that would’ve been appreciated. My thoughts are not final, but I think it’s had enough time to have a relative idea on my final thoughts. Also there aren’t any glitches that I noticed, and I’m really glad about that.

Pros: the first 2-3 levels are fun, classic little nightmares. It was terrifying being chased by the teacher. Puzzle weren’t too easy or too hard. The art style feels exactly like the games, like you really are in the world.  The train is a great unique addition. I love the return of the residents and climbing through the vents. I dont mind that there’s only snap turning cause smooth turning makes me nauseous.

Cons: controls could do with a little work. Platforming and climbing has a 50/50 chance of not working right. It really take you out of the immersion when you’re trying to run from something and you keep dying because the climbing is not working. The photo guy level just doesn’t feel scary. You can’t turn off the hood vignette. Some of the texture models look unfinished. Physics are a little wonky. The game is a little too short, maybe one more level and it would be a perfect length for a vr tie in.

Not a filler not boring and not little nightmares III this game worth every penny an absolute masterpiece the new boss  characters are really amazing and just what the OG atmosphere looked like , absolutely amazing and adding six Arc in such way , I’m speechless, the story is amazing visuals are amazing and the story is actually beyond your expectations whatever you have already, I’m big fan of the trilogy little nightmares III wasn’t what I wanted this Right here is what actually I wanted to see , music , direction , gameplay, level design absolutely 10/10 no question asked 🔥🔥.

Game is super short and creepy,  and its a walking simulator with a few puzzles, and a lot of hiding and climbing.  If you want a decent Megalophobia experience this might be worth your time.  

I think the game is bit expensive for its length, artisticly pleasing but graphics are trash on the quest 3 feels like im playing a PS2 game at best in VR. 

You are mostly walking in empty areas dealing with a minimal few giant monsters like around 5ish giants while mainly you are just doing a running sequences with 2 of them and while the 3 is basically hiding simiulator with a minor few puzzles along the until you move on to the next area thats mainly about it. 

With a little extra you can spend Reanimal (the original creators of Little Nightmares 1 &2) and get more content out of that than this. But if  you want to experince a minimized version of little nightmares or a big fan I guess this also might be worth for you too.

As I completed the game, I said to myself “Is that it?” Not because I thought the game was too short, but because I wanted to spend more time immersed in this world. Now, the short length of the game is just one of the 3 main complaints I’ve heard blasted everywhere, but I think 2 of these complaints are extreme nitpicks, and only 1 is really valid.

Firstly, people complain a lot about the hood vinaigrette or whatever around your screen. They say it breaks immersion. How? You barely notice it, and when you do, you really feel like shadow six scurrying from hidey hole to hidey hole. If anything, the hood increases immersion.

Secondly, people complain about snap turning. Okay, whatever, but it doesn’t really affect me, as, to increase immersion, I like to play vr games standing up and I want to crouch irl to crouch. Maybe if you’re sitting down, the snap turning can get  annoying, but I’ve heard that smooth turning is nauseous anyway.

Lastly, people complain most of all about the 2 hour long play time. While little nightmares have never really been known for their long games (most in 6-8 hour range) like I said earlier, I would appreciate more time in this world. I couldn’t help but feeling that this wasn’t “THE VR LITTLE NIGHTMARES EXPERIENCE”, but instead more of a test. Does the little nightmares formula work in vr? Absolutely. And if we get a new game with ALL new characters and a 6-8 hour run time, then it could genuinely be GOTY on my book. 

In the end, do I recommend this game? Absolutely. It was a blast. It’s perfectly scary without relying on jump scares. It’s tense and I think if you’re a fan of little nightmares (or just horror in general) then you’ll have a great time with this game. Maybe one day we’ll get dlc with 2-3 more chapters. If that happened, then this game would be more peak than it already was. But hey, who knows. I really do just like every new thing that comes out because o have the critical thinking skills of a 5 year old.
Worth every cent. I'm surprised the neighbors didn't call the police with how much screaming was happening. 😂 Whoever thought of making this game VR, thank you!

I just recently beat little nightmares lll and that game was good, but for the vr players they made a whole separate game. I like playing vr so if I can play one of my favorite horror games on the vr, it’s a W!!!

reviews.review_title: Bit more tinkering to make it perfect
reviews.review_description:
To get it out of the way: A setting for smooth turning and turning off the hood (At least making it see through for the player but still there on recordings and such) would work wonders

For the actual review: I loved this game; the tension (Especially the section with the photographer monster with the matches) were amazing, even outside of monster encounters (I swear I saw a painting change to have smiles after I passed by it), chase sections were tense, and the environments were gorgeous, it really felt like I was in the Nowhere.

The only problems I do have are that some things look a bit funky, like certain terrains (One that pops out is in the first chapter with the children in the chairs getting sucked into the televisions, look like grey unmoving blobs with fuzzy texturing. Making them pulse would make it way better) or animations with the monsters. I really hope there’s an option for more “extreme” VR users (Again, an option to turn the hood off and smooth turning), like actually being grabbed by the monsters; It looks really awkward and a few times annoying when I get grabbed by a hand, and instead of being grabbed, I just freeze and fade to black; REALLY annoying during the final chase where all I see is black on black and get grabbed by something to my side out of my field of vision, and pretty goofy looking where the Teacher, the one that grabs you in her mouth, looks like she just headbutts you.

Other than that, a very solid vr game (Though a sale would be the best time to grab it), and I would even buy DLC for it if it gets more chapters!

Exactly what I was looking for!!
What a super fun, magical, creepy storyline & amosphere! If you like disapearing into unique eerie places to hide & sneek around to avoid very bizarre and creepy wierd characters, this for you! I finished this game in one sitting for give or take 3 hours-ish but it was very satisfying & fun! I'll definitly play this again &  recommend it to my friends! 
-T.Rex

It's fine for a Little Nightmares VR game. You get used to the hood blocking the edges of your screen, and the snap turn isn't horrible if you can stomach it over smooth turning. It's rather short for $30. I think I finished the game in a 4 hour session? None of the puzzles are too complicated, and you'll die more to the wonky grab mechanics when you're climbing then you will to bosses if you're paying attention. The story isn't anything to write home about. Arguably, the weakest entry in the Little Nightmares franchise. Not that the story in any of them are stellar, but the horror and creepiness of the hallways and twisted furniture and settings are somewhat diminished when you have to run past them in first person, as opposed to being able to take it all in when you play the traditional games on a screen.


Tl;dr

It's fine, but $30 is too much for an okay 4 hour story where most of it is running between set pieces. Wait for it to go on sale. $20 would be good, $15 and below would be best.

reviews.review_title: Need to have more options for settings
reviews.review_description: Add a way to disable the hoodie. I don't like that I can't see and not a lot of people have that motion sickness. Then smooth turning although I don't use it a lot of people do! Also the climbing mechanic is cool just wish there was a way you could jump or a better system to crawl for those tiny ledges that normally you could instead of getting on your knees and grabbing the tiny edge!

Update : Buy this game! It is incredibly good. It's so good I'm playing through slowly to enjoy the atmosphere. Don't want it to end! 😱😁 

This game is very atmospheric and has a real eerie creepy feel....and I love it. I do suggest that as there is only an option of snap turn on or off, you either stand up or use a swivel chair, I use the chair and it's fine.. I would definitely suggest that the developer adds smooth turning for static seated players and give the option to remove the vignette. I understand that it gives a first person view from the characters perspective, but it gets in the way a little and can break immersion. I will say, it's worth every penny and I'm sure there will be some patches to make it even better. I'm happy I bought it. I'm hearing it's a little bit too short for the price so I'm hoping they will come up with more Little Nightmares with a long storyline.

reviews.review_title: Very Very Great game but a couple flaws.
reviews.review_description: This game was really enjoyable to play with a couple things they got wrong. First of the gameplay was terrifying in all the best ways possible (the teacher section made me poop my pants). The games graphics was also really good looking, even on the Meta Quest 2! The puzzles were great, but the best part about this game and nearly all little nightmares games is the Atmosphere, this game is really great at making you feel like you’re in the Nowhere in little nightmares. Although great there were a few small flaws like the hood blocking some of the screen, the game being a bit too short  and also THERE BEING NO SMOOTH TURNING!, but  most of the problems can be fixed in an update. But despite that I would definitely recommend this game to anyone whose a fan for these kind of creepy  disturbing games

This game is amazing, but there are a few glitches that I expect that they will hopefully patch: one is where items will get stuck in the wall or you get stuck between objects and have to got and back on. I love that they adapted the same feelings from the games. So if you’re a fan of little nightmares play this game. 4.9/5

Edit: please add dlc or make another game in vr this was really fun

reviews.review_title: Fun game when you can see.
reviews.review_description: It's a very enjoyable game with a major downside to it. You can't see much the game was made way too dark. I turned up all my brightness settings to Max. I also searched on Google just in case I was missing other settings that could be changed. game is still way too dark, hard to see. I'm literally stuck not even halfway through the game because I cannot see where I'm going. Waste of money knowing I play to the end.

reviews.review_title: Fun at first , ending is janky hot mess
reviews.review_description: May 7th...UPDATE just got to rush janky hit mess run fast ending and its a janky broken mess ruin it for me quit uninstall  frustrating mechanics that don't work,  climbing lockers didnt work after 5 tries time to move on to better games, I've never like a game thats rushes u so u cant enjoy nothing at , its bs development by developers once climbing lockers wasn't working I had anuff broken  game torture by poor development mechanics,  done un install for good and dropped it a few starseasy.100 percent prefer snap turn over horrorific smooth turn any day in any game while sitting down because smooth turn is extremely uncomfortable and nauseous in nature dont understand how ppl could want smooth turn at all anytime feels like ur spinning in the ISS uuughh smooth turn is ridicuously horrible in any game and throws ur equilibrium way off in a dizzy effect yuck, every bit as bad as the vignette imho and the hood is not as bad as most make it sound, yes id rather not have it on as I can not stand the horse blinder effect of vignette on but its not nearly as bad. Liking the game so far but haven't seen anything really different yet from other stealth games or anything new but its fun as is, as far being blown away try playing the amusement,  wow crazy deep immersion with the redirectional walking in ur 6 × 6 space with fantastic graphics,, but ffeel the game is a bit over hyped due to some kiddy fan club or the flat games or something again its good but nothing stands out as amazing like the game.....the amusement or even close to that level of immersion.

This game is very fun because I love the vibe of it and the colors also the puzzles are very interesting. The one downside is that I did get a bit motion sickness but that’s it. I rate this game a 4 out of 5!

You may think I'm being nice cause I'm a fan of Little Nightmares,BUT THIS GAME IS PEAK, The quality of this game is amazing and it's really fun and the mechanics are crazy! If you are new to VR or are just trying to find a game to play, I HIGHLY RECOMMEND THIS GAME!

This game series has been the peak of my life since 2017 i am a diehard fan and to say I was excited for this game is an understatement.
And ofcourse like all little nightmares games its short but worth it, you can essentially interact with everything this game is perfect for people like me who pick up and examine everything,  most items have their own sound effects too! And there's alot of items. If you speedrun it you could probably do it in an hour and 50 something minutes but if you savour it then you should get atmost 3.5 hours of gameplay and for the little nightmares fans you should know that thats double the gameplay time of Ln1 but I have to go so I highly recommend this game. 
Thanks Bandai Namco

Where do i begin?!
This game has stunning graphics!
Much better than the last game on console.
This game can be very scary and stressful which really makes it feel you are there!
I really recomend buying this if you have the chance!
Do not miss out on this amazing game!

reviews.review_title: This game isn’t letting me join back in
reviews.review_description:
So after the first play through which was good the game is good it’s nothing about the gameplay it’s about this bug THATS happening to me when I tried to load back in it was at a loading screen and after over 10 minutes of waiting it still at a loading screen I’ve deleted it and reinstalled it I’ve contacted meta support now im waiting so I hope this WASNT a waste 
of 45 dollars

reviews.review_title: This might have been the worst vr game
reviews.review_description: There were so many bugs and weird glitches that would happen and the story doesn't even make any sense to the other games and the climbing sucked because it wouldn't even work sometimes and you would get stuck on stuff for no reason whatsoever this game is not worth 30$

Some people say that it feels like it wasn’t made for vr? But for me the controls were really good! And having to crouch irl to in the game makes it so much better (theres a setting to turn on button crouching) 
and BRO these locations are SO good! The new monsters aswell are very little nightmares! And i love how they added new mechanics like have to carry a box of matches and actually having to light them instead of having a lighter. For me personally this was my favourite little nightmares game EVER! Definitely get this game if your an LN fan or like horror games. 100/10

reviews.review_title: FOR GOODNESS SAKE ADD SMOOTH TURN
reviews.review_description:
I knew nothing about about Little Nightmares, saw a lot of hype, first the bad stuff, snap turn must go please, give us the option of smooth turn,  so we can choose, o don’t mind the hood, it would be nice if this could be removed as you play, never seen anything like this in VR.
The spooky eerie feel adds to the tension and as I get more to grips with the game, I’m sure everything will click for me.
Visuals are outstanding for the Quest, so it’s a great start & look forward to going a bit further.

I love this game and will absolutely replay it. It was so nice to see the original LN characters again. The game ran very smooth, very high definition visuals, and I didn’t experience any glitches. This is one of the better VR games I’ve played in terms of quality. There’s a few things I can see would bother people (no smooth turning and not being able to take off the hood), but it was no big deal to me. I was fine either way. Highly recommend to any LN fan.
It boggles the mind that this game does not offer an option to disable the vignette. It’s absolutely awful playing it like this.

The game is great. Every fan of the franchise will enjoy it. To keep it short, it is a special experience, only ruined by the discomfort of having to press the joystick to run. I hope they can change this in a future update.

I absolutely loved this game, it captures you from the very beginning and you don’t want to stop playing.  It defo took me more than 2 and a half hours to complete (someone has mentioned on here), but I am not the worlds quickest gamer.  I love to take in the whole game, graphics etc which on some levels you don’t get much chance to do because your being chased.

It is doable in one day if you have the time and brain power.  Do I wish it was longer? It was perfect for me. Hope there is a 2nd one in the pipeline.

The title speaks for itself, Little Nightmares VR is exactly what it says it is. An awesome Little Nightmares game on VR and overall my experience was freaking phenomenal, I never really experienced much bugs, just a couple of collision glitches with objects but nothing that breaks the game. The only negative thing I can say is the game is quite short, I've seen others beat the game in 3 hours. Personally I took around 5 hours to beat it, but that was mostly due to messing around and "stopping to smell the roses" kind of ordeal. The majority of players will beat the game in under 3 hours. Which isn't half bad for 30 bucks, just saying some extra content to extend runtime wouldn't hurt. However in the end, the game is well made and a blast to experience the whole way through. Solid 8/10👌🗿
I’ve always loved the Little Nightmares games! I’ve played through 1 & 2 plus the first ones dlc. I’m super excited to try this one out, I got high hopes!

Great game cutscenes are amazing plus how u have to physically move but I have it 4 stars is because I feel like there should be setting the remove the cloak from ur vision so overall amazing game but plz add a setting to remove the cloak from ur vision
The whole game is just already peak, only the hood and the snap turn are kinda annoying but this could be patched in future updates. This is why I choose 4 star.

I was looking forward for this game to come out and was very disappointed with the quality of the gameplay and how difficult it became it turned into a chore and I was unable to finish the game as I got stuck climbing the giant drum with the barriers with the gaps in even if I had finished the game I can honestly say it wasn’t a fun experience

reviews.review_title: Tiny in a world of giants..
reviews.review_description:
I came in cautious. Translating Little Nightmares to VR is risky. The flat-screen originals live on art direction and dread and either could die in the jump. Altered Echoes mostly pulls it off. The atmosphere holds, the sense of scale is genuinely better than the console games (you're tiny in a world of giants, and it lands), and the audio is the star: music boxes that conjure rooms into being, sonic cues for safe paths. 

Removing the jump button took me an hour to forgive; the climbing and rope traversal is where the game lives now. Movement controls are clunky and the run barely beats a walk. Quest 3 visuals could push harder, I think. It looks like some performance was left on the table to keep Quest 2 parity. 

It's not long at about three to four hours. But that's pretty average for the franchise. If you're a fan, recommend. If you're new to the series, give it a beat to find its groove.

For the full review, search YouTube for 6DOF Reviews Little Nightmares VR Altered Echoes!

An amazing story and a truly original experience that makes you feel like a small child, really well done. However, it feels quite short, especially for the price, it would be more reasonable at about half the cost. Adding arms and a body would also enhance the immersion. That said, I still highly recommend it and give it 5 stars.

Little Nightmares Vr Altered Echoes takes Little Nightmares to the next Level. It’s absolutely fantastic. It keeps you on edge throughout and I had a few jump scares haha. I really hope they continue making more Little Nightmares games because it works so well. Also the game is fairly long and I actually liked the hood being shown. Overall I’m very impressed and it’s definitely worth the price. I highly recommend this vr experience, it’s one of the most good ones you will find.

Please add hand tacking￼ it is very hard at the last part when you have to climb, it is super hard because my grip trigger is not working because it needs a magnet to work, so can you please add hand tacking!!!!!

This game is pretty short but sweet. However the sweet makes up for that. Gameplay wise, it's perfect, and greatly captures the feel of being a small child in a massive world around you. Not to mention, the look of the game is amazing, with some moments making me stare out in awe. If your considering this game, it's great.

This game was SO MUCH FUN! bosses were probably the best part! They were absolutely terrifying but also as an up and coming content creator and being able to interact with a lot of different things made it that much more fun. Puzzles were a little on the tricky side but not too challenging. HIGHLY recommend!!! I just hope there's more to come as I did not want the game to end I was having so much fun!
I’ve Ben playing the little nightmares games since the beginning and when I saw the trailer my jaw dropped I waited and waited and when I actually played it was cinema 🤚😐✋
Its fun but i got up to a bit wher i couldnt figure out what to do. I think maybe they should give us tips on what to do on some points.
It’s good
Honestly it's my second favorite game in the series and feels very immersive to be in the little nightmares world and see thing we sometimes can't see in the original games.
I dont sleep anymore ever since this game came out all i do is play then play then play… i cant stop this game is too good

But it hadn’t done anything to keep me engaged after the first hour of play. It looks good but I didn’t have any nostalgia or love of the flat games so that didn’t help either. I’ll rate it 5 as it’s nothing fundamentally bad just not for me and not fair to devs to low mark for that reason alone.

The game is very good it's just that the last chase is very bugged, and that there's no smooth turning, people complain about the fact that the hood covers the screen even though you get used to it in the first chapter.

reviews.review_title: It’It’s so fun definitely worth the $30
reviews.review_description: I just now started playing it. This is literally like I would say really really good game. If you already played the second and the first one you can really tell they really put it together it is also really cool even if you didn’t play the first or second one ￼and it has really good graphics. It’s really cool cause you can touch everything there’s a whole bunch of things you can do. It seems really cool and it is really fun and cool. I would say it’s one of the best games ever. I would really recommend buying it. It’s really worth the $30. ￼ there’s a lot of things that you can do in it. That’s like not even really part of the game like you can draw on like papers that are you signed on the floor and you can climb on anything you want. You can pretty much do anything it’s actually really fun. There’s different chapters of it. There’s like chapter 1 and it goes all the way to like chapter 6 or five. It’s really cool ￼ sorry some of the words are messed up and it doesn’t make sense. It is because I’m doing speak to text and I don’t feel like going back and fixing all the words so yeah. ￼

If you are a little nightmares fan this is a must buy game in the series I see people complain but compared to little nightmares 3 this is so much better the only issue I can think of is the hood that blocks a portion of the screen but you learn to block it out after a while this game has perfect puzzles and chases and makes you feel like you are actually in the little nightmares universe I very much recommend

This game is outstanding and I def will replay it to get all the collectibles but I wish there was more chapters or it was cheaper price but it was still so so good

I hope that maybe there will be a dlc in the future like the past games

Got my heart beating fast after getting chased by monsters especially the teacher 😭 amazing experience 
I really enjoyed helping one of the nomes but there was no option for me to give it a hug just like in the original ones in 1 and 2

I hope they make part2 or something cuz I definitely want more

recommend playing it👌🏻

It was like 3 hours other than that really good and pretty scary, not worth 40 dollars maybe like 25 to 30. Also I think they could’ve made the aliasing a bit better with the quest 3. I also experienced little to no bugs like other people. It is SO annoying seeing people review games and it isn’t the devs fault and it’s really their headsets or internet. Might run it back honestly though. Also the hood not being able to take off isn’t really that big of a deal when playing. I got used to it pretty fast.
I love this game I played this since I was 5 100000000/100000000
Just finished, best little nightmares game out there (tied with number 2)

reviews.review_title: Give it 30 min and you'll be hooked
reviews.review_description: Starts a bit dull and not giving you the feeling. But it changes - if you love the games this is a must buy
When I try to play I get stuck at the loading screen, nothing I do can fix it. But I did get to play the first two chapters and so far I love it!!!

I especially loved the level on the train with the sleeping passengers. So surreal and atmospheric. It's like being in a dark children's book. 

As many pointed out: An option to turn off the hood would be great.

reviews.review_title: Beautiful worlds, nice game, worth the $
reviews.review_description: I played the first two Little Nightmares games. After a couple of hours with the VR version, I can say it didn't disappoint. Really well made. Nice worlds to just look around in. Definitely worth the money.
Definitely not worth 30$ it’s a pretty short game it was ok not too terrible but again for 30$ should be more gameplay….
Little nightmares is a good fun and helps me over come my fears love this game so much I really hope there more in the future!

Just finished the game and like previpus ln games the ending left my silent from shock  game had good atmosphere some parts were creepy buy this game its amazing like every other little nightmare games

This game is worth the money it’s as good as 1 and 2 and we don’t talk about little nightmares 3 cuz that was something sorta just ok but this game is seriously good and well done and worth the full price
Literally the best vr game I have ever played
I love the franchise and when I saw that there was gonna be a VR version I was sold instantly. I haven’t finished the game yet, but very impressed so far. Love it.
Aaahhh
I love the horror and puzzles my favorite was the conductor but I have one issue and it’s that there less chase aspect then the first three non vr games but it was fun

A phenomenal game, perfectly translating Little Nightmares to VR. From music to visuals, it’s great. Fits in really well with the franchise and I experienced no bugs.
